source: plain-language requirement refined in-conversation: real-time PreToolUse skill-invocation hard-gate, universal to the plugin

scenarios: blocks the first non-Skill tool call while the mandate is pending
acceptance_criteria: check_payload returns exit 2 for a non-Skill tool when the latest genuine prompt is an unsatisfied pipeline command
stderr names the expected pipeline skill

scenarios: detection is sourced from the audit module
read-only and built-in commands do not gate
an injected command/skill body echo does not re-block after the Skill was invoked
no codebase-specific strings or absolute paths
acceptance_criteria: isMeta / promptSource:system / isSidechain records excluded from the anchor
no codebase/repo/app token or absolute path in the hook
verified against real transcripts: 0 spurious blocks
satisfaction is exact/base or any-pipeline-engagement; no substring false-satisfy
command uses ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} + detect-once shim, no absolute path
full suite green under cp1252 AND PYTHONUTF8=1

testing_authorizations.playwright: N/A — no UI/frontend surface in this change (plugin hook + tests + docs).
testing_authorizations.dev_api_integration: N/A — no API surface; the pytest suite (incl. end-to-end subprocess execution of the hook) is the repo's integration surface.
